atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: register design tokens for generated utilities (see https://tailwindcss.com/docs/theme).

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: add content paths for class detection.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: load a JavaScript plugin.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: reference a legacy JS config file.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: define a custom utility.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: define a custom variant.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: define a named custom variant.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS: inline utility classes into a rule.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: import theme without emitting CSS.
